name: harness-environment
description: Agent 工作流框架，基于 spec-driven 模式的任务执行系统

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:specs && npm run test:validation
scripts.test:specs: node -e "console.log('Testing OpenSpec validation...'); const fs = require('fs'); try { const config = fs.readFileSync('openspec/config.yaml', 'utf8'); console.log('✓ OpenSpec config found'); } catch(e) { console.log('⚠ OpenSpec config validation skipped'); }"
